caption: A man wearing a light blue button-down shirt and black over-ear headphones with an attached microphone is centered against a plain, light-colored wall. The text "Ashish Raichur" is visible in the bottom left corner of each shot. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with both hands to emphasize his points. He begins with both hands raised and fingers spread wide. As the scene progresses, he brings his hands closer together in front of his chest, moving them dynamically as he speaks. His expression is focused and active. By the end of the sequence, he holds his palms up and facing forward in a stopping or explanatory motion. The background and his clothing remain consistent, while his hand positions and facial expressions shift as he continues to communicate.
